records.ety: [L. Arcturus, Gr. <?/ bearward, equiv. to <?/; <?/ bear + <?/ ward, guard. See Arctic.]

defs: A fixed star of the first magnitude in the constellation Boötes.
quotes: Canst thou guide Arcturus with his sons [Rev. Ver.: “the Bear with her train”].
notes: ☞ Arcturus has sometimes been incorrectly used as the name of the constellation, or even of Ursa Major.
